subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and steadfast in the Testament! Your letter has been received in the best of time.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد و راسخ پیمان نامه شما در بهترین زمانی وارد زیرا سالهای چند بود که
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @predictions and prophecies, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
